hero.label: Academic · Activist · Author
hero.title: Demand the Impossible
hero.body: After three decades of working at the intersection of research and action, I'm seeking collaborators for high-impact projects that can help communities build sustainable, just, and resilient futures.

projectsSectionLabel: Real-world initiatives demonstrating another way is possible

featuredProjects.title: LILAC Co-Housing
featuredProjects.description: The UK's first affordable ecological co-housing community — 20 households in Leeds using straw-bale construction and a Mutual Home Ownership Society model.
featuredProjects.impact: Pioneered the MHOS model, making eco housing financially accessible.

featuredProjects.title: Climate Action Leeds
featuredProjects.description: City-wide climate mobilisation through a 'hub and spoke' model, connecting grassroots communities around a shared goal of zero carbon by the 2030s.
featuredProjects.impact: Engaged 8,700+ people. Produced the Leeds Doughnut Economics Portrait.

featuredProjects.title: Kirkstall Valley Development Trust
featuredProjects.description: A community development trust working to protect and enhance the Kirkstall Valley area of Leeds, including managing Kirkstall Valley Park.

publicationsSectionLabel: Research that bridges academia and activism
